chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3198 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on MA No.13085 / 2017. 3. For katcha peshi. 07-02-2018 None present. This petition is called for hearing. Neither the petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. It is 01.10 pm. This petition was filed on 10.10.2017 since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is pursuing this petition diligently, which is dismissed non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
